name: icmp_hostile_type_abort
description: bug-trigger parse-no-fatal-on-hostile: inner ICMP with a type the C icmp_get_data() netutil_fatal()s on (netutil.cc). Port must return Err, not abort.

name: ipv4_ihl_0
description: boundary: IPv4 IHL=0 (illegal, header len underflow bait)

name: ipv4_ihl_15_no_opts
description: boundary: IPv4 IHL=15 (60-byte hdr) but no option bytes present

name: ipv4_totlen_overflow
description: boundary: IPv4 total_len far exceeds actual bytes

name: trunc_eth_only
description: truncation: Ethernet header only, no L3

name: trunc_ip_no_l4
description: truncation: IPv4 header, zero transport bytes

name: trunc_tcp_half
description: truncation: TCP cut mid-header (10 of 20 bytes)

name: udp_maxlen_cksum_trigger
description: bug-trigger udp-checksum-no-fixed-buffer: max-size UDP payload driving the C setSum() 1-byte stack overflow (UDPHeader.cc:197/209). Port must not overflow.
